title: Triton Inference Server
code:
class TritonScheduler:
    def __init__(self, max_batch=4):
        self.queue = []
        self.max_batch = max_batch
    def add_request(self, req):
        self.queue.append(req)
    def get_batch(self):
        batch = self.queue[:self.max_batch]
        self.queue = self.queue[self.max_batch:]
        return batch

def run_practice():
    sc = TritonScheduler(2)
    sc.add_request('r1')
    sc.add_request('r2')
    sc.add_request('r3')
    b1 = sc.get_batch()
    assert len(b1) == 2
    assert sc.queue == ['r3']
    print('[PASS] Triton queue scheduler simulations checked.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
